---
title: "The Climate Atlas"
description: |
  Welcome to the website. I hope you enjoy it!
site: distill::distill_website 
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)

# Learn more about creating websites with Distill at:
# https://rstudio.github.io/distill/website.html

# Learn more about publishing to GitHub Pages at:
# https://rstudio.github.io/distill/publish_website.html#github-pages

```



```{r}
library(aRtsy)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

set.seed(7)

sky_palette1 <- c("#1B263B", "#415A77", "#778DA9")
sky_palette2 <- c("#5D6D7E", "#AED6F1", "#D6E4F0")
sky_palette3 <- c("#B0E0E6", "#FFFFFF", "#EAF4F4")


art1 <- canvas_flow(colors = sky_palette1, background = "#0B1320",
                    lines = 1200, lwd = 0.4)
art2 <- canvas_flow(colors = sky_palette2, background = "white",
                    lines = 900,  lwd = 0.35)
art3 <- canvas_flow(colors = sky_palette3, background = "white",
                    lines = 700,  lwd = 0.25)

header <- ggplot() +
  annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.72, hjust = 0.5, size = 14,
           fontface = "bold", color = "#1B263B",
           label = "The Climate Atlas") +
  annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.42, hjust = 0.5, size = 5,
           color = "#415A77",
           label = "A Visual Exhibit of Climate in 226 U.S. Cities") +
  xlim(0, 1) + ylim(0, 1) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA))

footer <- ggplot() +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 0.25, xmax = 0.75, ymin = 0.3, ymax = 0.7,
           fill = "#1B263B") +
  annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, size = 5,
           color = "white", fontface = "bold",
           label = "ENTER THE EXHIBIT  -->") +
  xlim(0, 1) + ylim(0, 1) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA))

infographic <- header / (art1 | art2 | art3) / footer +
  plot_layout(heights = c(0.7, 4, 0.5))

ggsave("sky_infographic3.png",
       infographic, width = 12, height = 10, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

knitr::include_graphics("sky_infographic3.png")
```
